//: Strict typecheck for Node build/audit/test tooling and Playwright specs that the app tsconfig excludes. erasableSyntaxOnly keeps node-run tooling strip-compatible (no enums/namespaces/param-properties).
//exclude: The audit harness's own fixtures are test data — tiny crafted trees (sometimes intentionally malformed, e.g. a deliberately wrong .ts) that prove a rule fires. They are not production source, so they're excluded from the typecheck (mirrors the ruff/ty exclude in pyproject.toml). PAN016's typecheck-coverage member treats them as a declared non-production tree.
